failure_modes.text: Local optimization can consume energy while the real throughput ceiling remains fixed elsewhere.
failure_modes.mitigation: Subordinate all optimization to the constraint: do not improve non-bottleneck steps until the real throughput ceiling is addressed.

failure_modes.text: Constraint language becomes theater when no current cap, governing metric, or movement evidence is named.
failure_modes.mitigation: Name the constraint concretely: require a specific capacity cap, governing metric, and evidence of movement before accepting that constraint language is being used productively.

failure_modes.text: The model breaks when teams keep fixing the old bottleneck after the constraint has already shifted somewhere else.
failure_modes.mitigation: Re-diagnose the constraint after every improvement cycle: once the old bottleneck is relieved, the constraint shifts — re-map the flow to find the new one.

premortem_questions.text: Before committing: what is the single measured limit that would still cap throughput if every local improvement in this plan succeeded next week?
premortem_questions.source_quote: Before committing: what is the single measured limit that would still cap throughput if every local improvement in this plan succeeded next week?

premortem_questions.text: If this first bottleneck actually moves, what step becomes the next cap within two weeks?
premortem_questions.source_quote: If this first bottleneck actually moves, what step becomes the next cap within two weeks, and what evidence in this plan would tell us the constraint has already shifted there?

premortem_questions.text: Which task in this plan is consuming the same scarce team, approval slot, or specialist time needed at the bottleneck?
premortem_questions.source_quote: Which task in this plan is consuming the same scarce team, approval slot, or specialist time needed at the bottleneck

heuristics.text: Define constraints rigorously up front so the problem scope and the bottleneck candidate are explicit before solutioning.
Disaggregate and prioritize until only the branches affecting the binding constraint stay in focus.
Re-score the constraint after each major change so the action sequence moves with the bottleneck.

curation_notes.summary: The source is naturally chunk-ready on measured bottlenecks, sequencing discipline, and anti-bottleneck-theater safeguards.
donor_drops: Did not preserve donor operations sprawl because the raw source is stronger on explicit caps, retest cadence, and scarce-lane discipline.
open_questions: The third heuristic is normalized from the mitigation table rather than the earlier playbook because the retest cadence is more operational there.

allies: The raw ally section is strong on cognitive-load-theory and commander's-intent style alignment as later relation material.
antagonists: The raw antagonists section is strong on confirmation-bias and curse-of-knowledge, but only the cleanest canonical ids should survive Wave 3.
structured_tensions: The source explicitly preserves tensions against optimization-theory and commitment-bias.
